creator: fidaj@ukr.net
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #7)
>- cairo-dock-plugins fetch is broken: you fetch both distfiles from the same reposiory

is commit broken fetch https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/deskutils/cairo-dock-plugins/distinfo?r1=375699&r2=385521

---SHA256 (cairo-dock-plugins-png-icons.tar.gz) = f88327b073ac3673ea8765c608c7fe7beb1357b2c16c4dd8a26c14ec9cc2244a
+++SHA256 (cairo-dock-plugins-png-icons.tar.gz) = 5e841844f5cb99273b63f181b97acb0f1263aa6ba68bfe5afc6bf78675dbe505

---SIZE (cairo-dock-plugins-png-icons.tar.gz) = 1446489
+++SIZE (cairo-dock-plugins-png-icons.tar.gz) = 7398210

because original size archive pkg icons 1446489 for several years!
